title: Amtech G1000 280mm x 140mm Polyurethane Float
features: TOUGH AND LIGHTWEIGHT: 280mm x 140mm in size, this lightweight, non-absorbent float is made from rigid cellular polyurethane
ENSURES A MATT FINISH: The poly float is designed to withstand the abrasion of working with concrete and renders it to a matt finish
SIZE CAPACITY: 280 mm / 140 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Float See more
